title: Online Retail Stocks Q4 Earnings: Revolve (NYSE:RVLV) Firing on All Cylinders
text: Revolve Group delivered strong Q4 results, demonstrating impressive operational performance. Full Year 2025: Full year 2025 net sales were $1.226B (+8%), with Adjusted EBITDA of $93.8M (+35%) and free cash flow of $46.2M (+157%). Q4 2025: Q4 net sales were $324.4M (+10% YoY) and Q4 net income was $18.6M (+58% YoY). This print exceeded analysts' expectations by 6.2%. Q1 2026: Online fashion retailer Revolve (NYSE:RVLV) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 15.6% year on year to $342.9 million. The company's strong operational execution and strategic initiatives continue to drive market share gains in the competitive fashion e-commerce sector.
